name: Transport Unstable
summary: Your commute is no longer dependable enough to ignore. Future months get tighter until you stabilize the lane.
blocked_door_hints: Reliable work performance is harder to hold while the commute stays fragile.
resolution_hint: Best resolution: repair properly, downgrade, or buy breathing room before another missed shift lands.

name: Credit Squeeze
summary: Your file is under pressure and future financing or relief windows will depend on how clean the next few months stay.
blocked_door_hints: Housing and transport financing stay narrower while this squeeze is active.
resolution_hint: Best resolution: clean up utilization, rebuild consistently, or use a real refinance window when it opens.

name: Education Slipping
summary: Academic pressure is no longer a one-month wobble. The lane needs active protection or it will keep dragging the run.
blocked_door_hints: Promotion and survival plays get less flexible when school pressure keeps slipping.
resolution_hint: Best resolution: reduce intensity, protect standing, or pause deliberately instead of letting the lane collapse.
